overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit streets. The character follows a pink-haired pedestrian under an overpass, crosses an intersection with passing traffic, and continues past NCPD police vehicles and holographic storefront advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with bright pink hair along a yellow tactile sidewalk beneath an overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and white jacket walking steadily ahead

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure overhead with support columns
bright yellow textured pedestrian walkway with diamond plate pattern
thick cylindrical metal pillar supporting the overpass
glowing blue and red commercial signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass on a bright yellow tactile sidewalk, following a pink-haired pedestrian through a dimly lit corridor with neon signs visible on the left. The environment is sheltered with artificial lighting from street lamps and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk under overpass

events.description: followed pedestrian exits frame right, camera continues toward open intersection
green vintage-style coupe drives across the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing under the overpass
dark wet asphalt street with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide intersection, the camera crosses yellow-striped crosswalk markings as a green vintage car passes in front. The space opens up with mixed lighting from street lamps and distant neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with police presence and storefronts

events.description: camera turns right onto the sidewalk and continues walking along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past an NCPD police vehicle and continuing past various neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car with glowing blue text parked on the sidewalk

entered.detail: black police vehicle with illuminated NCPD lettering on the side
cyan neon sign reading BODYWEIGHT with red square accents
massive holographic advertisement showing a woman's face
purple and red neon sign for Brain Wash establishment
row of parked vehicles along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Turning right onto a neon-drenched sidewalk, the camera passes an NCPD police car with officers nearby, then continues along wet pavement reflecting vibrant holographic advertisements. The Brain Wash neon sign becomes prominent as the camera moves deeper into the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched commercial heart of Night City. It begins by trailing a pink-haired pedestrian along a bright yellow tactile sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, where the lighting is dim and artificial. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the environment opens into a wide intersection where the view expands across yellow-striped crosswalks and a passing green vintage car. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right onto a wet sidewalk, passing NCPD police vehicles and officers while the lighting transforms into a kaleidoscope of reflections. Finally, the movement carries the viewer deeper into the district, passing vibrant holographic advertisements and the prominent Brain Wash neon sign.
